title: Step S-SWQT-0003-2: 主题 token 与图表例外治理

items.problemDefinition: 静态契约只检查引用存在和少数裸值，图表例外没有双主题实际渲染证据。
items.requirementsDefinition: 校验两套正式主题的必填语义 token、语义前景/背景配对，并以稳定图表夹具记录双主题截图和 axe 证据。
items.plainLanguage: 让 token 和图表例外都由可复跑证据证明。

candidateOptions.B: 静态解析加真实浏览器图表夹具

recommendedOption.rationale: 同时覆盖 token 漂移和 Recharts 实际渲染。

items.granularityDecision: fine-enough：token 解析和图表例外共享主题治理验收。
items.testCaseDesign: 静态 token 断言、双主题截图与 axe。
items.acceptanceToTestMapping: token 规则→check:design-contract；图表例外→theme-chart Playwright。
items.regressionTestDesign: 缺 token、未批准 raw 值或图表回归均失败。
items.residualRisk: 自动 a11y 不替代产品语义人工审查。

readiness.reason: 现有静态脚本、Playwright 和消费者夹具可直接执行。

executionContract.expectedChangeSurface: Semantic-token static contract, Recharts exception mapping, consumer chart fixture, and governance documentation.
executionContract.acceptanceCriteria: Both formal themes expose required semantic colors and contrast pairs; alias errors and raw values fail; documented Recharts selectors have rendered light/dark evidence.
executionContract.validationEvidenceRequired: check:design-contract, normal eight-project browser matrix, consumer typecheck/build, and packed-consumer browser verification.
executionContract.rollbackNotes: Revert the checker, consumer chart fixture, exception record, screenshots, and dependency lock resolution together.

implementationSummary.whatChanged: Expanded the static checker with formal-theme semantic-token and contrast-pair verification; added an animated-free semantic Recharts line-chart fixture with screenshot/axe coverage; documented narrow SVG literal-selector exceptions and a dated visual review.
implementationSummary.whySatisfiesStep: Token drift is caught statically while the otherwise unavoidable Recharts literal-selector bridge is demonstrated in both formal themes at runtime.
implementationSummary.intentionallyUnchanged: No third theme, product page shell, or public component API was introduced.

changeSurface.configAnchors: examples/ui-consumer/package.json and bun.lock add the chart runtime dependency.

executionNotes.decisionsDuringImplementation: Used existing ChartContainer semantic metric variables; limited #fff/#ccc to the component-level Recharts compatibility selectors.
executionNotes.risksDiscovered: Recharts initial animation destabilized screenshots; setting isAnimationActive=false fixed the root cause and normal-mode suites then passed.

validationReferences.notes: Parses both formal theme blocks and scans approved exception boundaries.
34 passed, 6 intentional scope skips; chart screenshot and axe run in all theme/viewport projects.
Both tarball installation layouts run the browser matrix.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Implementation is constrained to token governance, a chart compatibility mapping, browser evidence, and documentation; no public API or third theme was added.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: No product-specific data visualization semantics were claimed.

gateOutcomes.evidence: check:design-contract verifies every required semantic token and foreground/background pair in :root and [data-theme=dark], plus aliases, cycles, raw values, and theme bypasses.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: No deprecated token syntax currently exists, so deprecation-reference checking is vacuously satisfied.

gateOutcomes.evidence: theme-chart uses semantic metric variables, has two rendered curves, screenshots and axe in light/dark × compact/data-dense/lg/xl; reviewed light and dark baselines are recorded in the exception register.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Automated axe and baseline inspection do not prove domain-specific analytic correctness.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Both isolated and hoisted tarball consumers typecheck, build, validate emitted CSS, switch theme, and run the same browser matrix.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Private registry remote publication is an owned external follow-up.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Step retains source Feature; docs README exposes the quality and exception records; research report declares historical scope and current Feature ownership.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Legacy global workflow-numbering findings are outside this Feature boundary.

items.projectCompanionFactDecision: not-needed: existing test and validation handoff remains correct; updated experience documentation is the appropriate project fact surface.
items.residualRisk: Remote registry authentication and historical numbering migration remain documented non-blocking follow-ups.
items.followUp: Promote Step 2, which releases packed-consumer evidence Step 3.

items.validationSummary: Formal-theme semantic token and contrast checks, chart screenshot/axe matrix, consumer typecheck/build, and both packed-consumer browser matrices passed.
items.rootMount: Yes - layout v3 stable Step path; no physical archive move.
items.hardPromotionGateSummary: minimum auto-filled by workflow promote; validationSummary provided.
items.testCaseSummary: Formal-theme semantic token and contrast checks, chart screenshot/axe matrix, consumer typecheck/build, and both packed-consumer browser matrices passed.

items.minimumSetSatisfied: Yes - workflow promote populated minimum registry/audit records before setting status=delivered.

requirementAudit.requirement: reviewed Step can be delivered only with closure records.
requirementAudit.evidence: workflow promote populated delivered-registry-entry and completion-audit before status=delivered.
requirementAudit.risk: Minimum auto-fill is less descriptive than a hand-authored Completion Audit.
requirementAudit.followUp: Review owner may enrich the audit before delivery when richer evidence is required.

items.intermediateDocumentStateAudit: delivered-registry-entry and completion-audit populated before final status=delivered.

closingSelfAudit.closingSelfAuditEvidence: Closing triad minimum: reviewed precondition satisfied; validationSummary present; registry/audit records populated before status=delivered.

validationSummary: Formal-theme semantic token and contrast checks, chart screenshot/axe matrix, consumer typecheck/build, and both packed-consumer browser matrices passed.
